ValidationRule.description: TSG Profile just can convert Lead Discovery Records when they are the owners of that records.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (!IsOwnerTSG__c && $Profile.Name = 'TSG Sales' && IsConverted = TRUE) || ($User.Id != OwnerId && $Profile.Name = 'TSG Sales' && IsConverted = TRUE)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can only convert a Lead Discovery record if you are the owner of that record, otherwise you must Request Progression to Opportunity
